title: dalbergia hepperi
intro: Dalbergia hepperi, also known as the Hepper's Dalbergia, is a species of legume tree in the family Fabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Dalbergia hepperi include relief from fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Dalbergia hepperi can be made into decoctions, infusions, and powders, which are used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be under the guidance of a medical professional.
